title: TelemetryDecisionRecord
description: Schema for a single record in the FileTelemetrySink JSONL ledger. Phase 21.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing zero-indexed record sequence number.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous record, or GENESIS_PREV_HASH for sequence 0.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of {sequence, prev_hash, payload} serialized with sort_keys=True.

payload.description: The routed_intelligence_decision.v1 payload emitted by RoutedDecisionTelemetry.
